item.title: Blink-based SSH Workstation
item.description: Server Setup I use Nix to install latest software, chezmoi to manage configuration files, and starship and fastfetch for my shell (zsh). fd is installed as a dependency for Doom Emacs, and mosh is used with Blink to provide UDP roaming capability.

item.title: Convenient CLI Tools
item.description: dog (DNS resolution) xhs, xh (HTTP/S request) zellij (tmux) eza, lsd (ls) fd, bfs (find) rg (grep) pv (pipe viewer) dug (DNS propagation checker) ffsend (share files securely) age (simple file encryption tool) restic (file backup tool) rclone (rsync for cloud) namei (check parent directory permissions) ncdu (TUI disk usage analyzer) lft (Layer Four Traceroute) .

item.title: namei
item.description: namei -om <path> displays permissions follows each pathname and prints their modes and owners. <path> should be absolute.

item.title: yay
item.description: Install /usr/bin/core_perl must be added to PATH when you run yay. Re-login to fix pod2man not found issue. Clean Build Clean build is effectively git reset --hard origin/HEAD; git clean -fdx before building the package.

item.title: rust
item.description: With rust-analyzer, hyperlinks from markdown hover text (get-text-property (point) 'help-echo) are not clickable. This is supposedly fixed in Emacs (Eglot) commit cb562118cb14, but does not work with rustic specifically.

item.title: tree-sitter
item.description: Use existing *-ts-mode package First, install packages in package.el. (package! tree-sitter-langs :pin "3a3ad0527d5f8c7768678878eb5cfe399bedf703") (package! typst-ts-mode :recipe (:host sourcehut :repo "l2dy/typst-ts-mode") :pin "39a9e63c019bd5498c8f0e5a7ee8cb9d6bb53fd0") If package depends on treesit instead of tree-sitter, it’s required to copy and rename parser library files.

item.title: OCI IPv6 Address Fix
item.description: Issue On boot, Linux instances can get its IPv6 address, but after lease expires, it is possible to lose the address. Solution The Stupid but effective way Use systemd to add a static address to the interface.

item.title: Speed Test Website and Tools
item.description: Web https://speed.cloudflare.com/ https://fast.com/ https://speed.measurementlab.net/ (also available at https://www.google.com/search?q=speed+test) https://www.

item.title: IP and BGP ASN Data Lookup Services
item.description: Web Global Hurricane Electric BGP Toolkit https://bgp.tools/ can discover recursive DNS (“local DNS”) resolver IPs. https://radar.cloudflare.com/ (https://speed.

item.title: IPv6 in IPv4 Tunnel
item.description: Protocol 41 6in4 Hurricane Electric’s IPv6 Tunnel Broker uses this protocol. The prefix allocated is owned by the SP. 6rd An SP could set up 6rd Border Relays that is delegated a 6rd prefix.
